lobe.name: Svrn7.Common
lobe.title: SVRN7 Common Helpers LOBE
lobe.description: Shared helpers and utilities available in all runspaces. Provides DID URL parsing, logging wrappers, and common validation functions. Loaded eagerly at TDA startup.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Shared utility LOBE with no protocol handlers. Provides helpers used by all other LOBEs.
compositionHints: Do not import — already available in all runspaces as an eager LOBE.
limitations: Contains no entry-point cmdlets. Not a valid Switchboard routing target.
